description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with two stages: test and deploy. In the test stage add a unit_test job that uses the brianegan/flutter_lcov:v9 Docker image, runs "flutter test --coverage" then "genhtml coverage/lcov.info --output=coverage", and stores the coverage/ directory as an artifact. In the deploy stage add a pages job that uses the alpine Docker image, depends on unit_test, runs "mkdir public" and "mv coverage/ public/coverage/", publishes the public/ directory as a pages artifact, and only runs on the master branch.
